proposal_text.title: # Execute EP8, EP9 and EP10
proposal_text.description:
# Execute EP8, EP9 and EP10
Executes EP8, EP9 and EP10 as passed on Snapshot:

- [EP8] [Executable] Reimburse True Names for expenses and tax obligations incurred on behalf of the DAO: [https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0xdf7e59e58ab0cf5ee0a591bd65369db3ee5091ae3b7ca696a0d31c2eac9959f5](<https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0xdf7e59e58ab0cf5ee0a591bd65369db3ee5091ae3b7ca696a0d31c2eac9959f5>)

- [EP9] [Executable] Change to Exponential Premium Price Oracle: [https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0xe040bdae812af4bd5b3b6e3f46ed1ff4701986c338b827ac8f05807c2b9b9d73](<https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0xe040bdae812af4bd5b3b6e3f46ed1ff4701986c338b827ac8f05807c2b9b9d73>)

- [EP10] [Executable] Fund a DAO-Governed Identity Server: [https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0x104eb11d42813fadc2b408856e8fa2c10e34dbb4a87abaa2f089ece124263f16](<https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0x104eb11d42813fadc2b408856e8fa2c10e34dbb4a87abaa2f089ece124263f16>)
